_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: spheres under selumetinib-ogerin cotreatment conditions lost compactness and exhibited an enhanced disaggregated appearance compared with spheres under single treatment and controls conditions
details: iPSC-derived NF1-/- differentiating SCs (~70%) in neurofibromaspheres showed enhanced disaggregation and increased cell death when treated with selumetinib-ogerin cotreatment compared to single treatments
